**Synthesizing transfer list**

I'm creating a list of 10 specific items to transfer from waqup-new to packages/web following the docs. I'm identifying specific layout components to transfer: waqup-new's unified Layout with scroll nav and Framer Motion mobile menu vs packages/web's simpler AppHeader. 

I'm evaluating font and global CSS differences between layouts. I'm identifying UI component patterns and styling approaches for transfer. 

**Comparing auth flows**

I'm noting that waqup-new uses inline auth forms on homepage while packages/web has dedicated login/signup pages. 

**Comparing UI layouts**

I'm observing that waqup-new uses grid layouts with color-coded icons for Quick Actions and Menu Items, while packages/web home has a simpler structure without Reminders or Credits display. I'm noting that waqup-new uses structured multi-step wizards with color-coded icons and subtle tips boxes, while packages/web appears to have a more basic layout structure. 

I'm noting that waqup-new uses Tailwind classes heavily while packages/web relies on inline styles and design tokens. 

**Adding typography base**

I'm adding Inter font with antialiased and font-feature-settings to ensure consistent professional typography. I'm implementing global design tokens and utility classes for consistent UI elements. </details></think>

---


Here are **10 things to bring from waqup-new into your main solution (packages/web)**, aligned with your docs and without changing any code.

---

## 1. **Layout with scroll-aware nav and user dropdown**
In `waqup-new/waqup-new/app/components/layout/Layout.tsx`:
- Nav background changes on scroll (`isScrolled ? 'bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-lg' : 'bg-transparent'`)
- User dropdown with Credits balance, Share & Earn, Settings
- Framer Motion for mobile menu
- Clear split between public vs authenticated nav

Use this to unify header behavior and surface Credits / Share & Earn as in Phase 10 and the referral docs.

---

## 2. **Inter font and base typography**
In `waqup-new/waqup-new/app/layout.tsx`:
- Inter via `next/font/google`
- `antialiased`, `font-feature-settings: "rlig" 1, "calt" 1`
- `text-rendering: optimizeLegibility`, `-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased`

Add the same font and settings to your root layout to get a consistent typography baseline.

---

## 3. **Global CSS utilities and tokens**
In `waqup-new/waqup-new/app/components/styles/globals.css`:
- `.btn`, `.btn-primary`, `.btn-secondary` with gradient and transitions
- `.card`, `.input` utility classes
- `.glass` morphism
- `.gradient-text`, `.animate-fade-in`, `.animate-slide-up`
- `:focus-visible` and `::selection` styles

These can back your design system and reduce inline style duplication.

---

## 4. **Reusable AuthForm component**
In `waqup-new/waqup-new/app/components/auth/AuthForm.tsx`:
- Shared sign in / sign up form
- Error block: `bg-red-500/10 border-red-500/20 rounded-lg`
- Inputs: `bg-white/5 border-white/10 rounded-lg focus:ring-purple-500`
- Google OAuth button with loading state

Create an equivalent in packages/web and reuse for login, signup, and any inline auth.

---

## 5. **RitualBuilderContext pattern for creation flows**
In `waqup-new/waqup-new/app/(sanctuary)/rituals/create/layout.tsx`:
- `RitualBuilderProvider` wrapping the create flow
- Shared layout: `py-12 px-4 sm:px-6`, gradient background

Mirror this for affirmations/meditations/rituals so creation flows share context and layout as in your pipeline docs (Intent → Context → Personalization → Script → Voice → Audio → Review).

---

## 6. **Create-flow “init” step pattern**
In `waqup-new/waqup-new/app/(sanctuary)/rituals/create/init/page.tsx`:
- STEPS array with icon, title, description
- “Before You Begin” tips box (`bg-white/5 rounded-lg`)
- Single primary CTA: “Begin Journey →”

Use the same pattern for the first step of each pipeline: Intent / Init, then Tips, then primary CTA.

---

## 7. **Navigation aligned with product (Sanctuary, Library, Reminders)**
In `waqup-new/waqup-new/app/components/layout/Layout.tsx`:
- Main nav: Sanctuary, Library, Reminders (with icons)
- User menu: Credits (with balance), Share & Earn (highlight), Settings

Align your nav with this and your docs: Sanctuary as home, Library, Reminders, plus Credits and Share & Earn in the menu.

---

## 8. **Inline auth on homepage**
In `waqup-new/waqup-new/app/page.tsx`:
- `?mode=signin` / `?mode=signup` shows AuthForm inline on the landing page
- Same AnimatedBackground and card styling
- “Back to Home” link

Add the same query-param handling on your landing page to reduce friction for returning users.

---

## 9. **Button with CVA and Tailwind variants**
In `waqup-new/waqup-new/app/components/shared/Button.tsx`:
- `class-variance-authority` for variants (default, primary, ghost, link)
- Sizes: default, sm, lg, icon
- Tailwind classes for `rounded-lg`, transitions, focus ring

Introduce a similar Button in packages/web to standardize variants and sizes while keeping your design tokens.

---

## 10. **Sanctuary home page grid structure**
In `waqup-new/waqup-new/app/(sanctuary)/sanctuary/page.tsx`:
- `pt-24` for fixed nav
- Quick Actions: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8`
- Menu Items: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8`
- Cards: `bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/10 rounded-xl`, hover `hover:bg-white/10`
- Icon circles per action: `w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-purple-500/20`, `text-purple-400`

Apply this grid and card pattern to your Sanctuary/home page so it matches the reference layout and spacing.

---

**Docs alignment**
- Pipelines: `02-pipeline-affirmations.md`, `03-pipeline-meditations.md`, `04-pipeline-rituals.md`
- Conversation: `08-llm-conversation-summary.md` (RitualBuilderContext supports state machine and context flow)
- Pages: `04-pages-comparison.md` (Sanctuary, Library, Reminders, Credits, Share & Earn)
- Phase 10: Credits display in nav/profile

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Analyzing design system**

I'm examining the design system's Tailwind configuration to ensure consistency across packages/web and the reference app. 

**Consolidating theme tokens**

I'm consolidating design tokens into `src/theme/` and avoiding duplication with global variables. I'm extending globals.css with CSS variables from the JS-based theme to enable utility classes that reference theme values. 

**Refactoring button component**

I'm refactoring the button component to use class-variance-authority for cleaner styling. 

**Aligning nav structure**

I'm aligning the nav structure to match the reference pattern with Sanctuary, Library, Reminders as main items. I'm confirming the main nav items as Sanctuary, Library, Reminders with Create New as a quick action on the Sanctuary page. </details></think>

{
  "plan": "# Design System Alignment Plan\n\n## Architecture Overview\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart TB\n    subgraph singleSource [Single Source of Truth]\n        Theme[src/theme/]\n        DesignTokens[design-tokens.ts]\n        Animations[animations.css]\n        Globals[globals.css]\n    end\n    \n    subgraph components [Components - consume theme only]\n        Layout[AppLayout]\n        Button[Button]\n        Card[Card]\n        GlassCard[GlassCard]\n        PageShell[PageShell]\n    end\n    \n    Theme --&gt; DesignTokens\n    Theme --&gt; components\n    Animations --&gt; Globals\n    Globals --&gt; Layout\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Phase 1: Foundation - Dependencies and Theme\n\n### 1.1 Add dependencies\n- **framer-motion** (for Layout mobile menu and nav animations)\n- **class-variance-authority** (for Button variants)\n- **clsx** + **tailwind-merge** (for cn() utility)\n\n### 1.2 Add &#96;cn()&#96; utility\n- Create [packages/web/src/lib/utils.ts](packages/web/src/lib/utils.ts) with &#96;cn(...inputs: ClassValue[])&#96; using clsx + tailwind-merge\n- Mirror reference: &#96;waqup-new/waqup-new/app/lib/utils/utils.ts&#96;\n\n### 1.3 Extend design tokens\n- In [packages/web/src/theme/design-tokens.ts](packages/web/src/theme/design-tokens.ts), add:\n  - &#96;NAV_HEIGHT = '64px'&#96; (h-16)\n  - &#96;PAGE_TOP_PADDING = '96px'&#96; (pt-24 for content below fixed nav)\n  - &#96;MAX_WIDTH_7XL = '1280px'&#96; (max-w-7xl)\n- Document in comments: these are the canonical values; components import from here only\n\n---\n\n## Phase 2: Typography and Globals\n\n### 2.1 Inter font in root layout\n- In [packages/web/app/layout.tsx](packages/web/app/layout.tsx):\n  - Import Inter from &#96;next/font/google&#96;: &#96;Inter({ subsets: ['latin'] })&#96;\n  - Apply to &#96;&lt;body className={inter.className}&gt;&#96;\n  - Add: &#96;antialiased&#96;, &#96;font-feature-settings&#96;, &#96;text-rendering&#96;, &#96;-webkit-font-smoothing&#96; via Tailwind classes or inline\n\n### 2.2 Expand globals.css\n- In [packages/web/app/globals.css](packages/web/app/globals.css):\n  - Keep existing reset\n  - Add &#96;@layer base&#96;: &#96;html { scroll-behavior: smooth }&#96;, &#96;body&#96; with &#96;antialiased&#96;\n  - Add &#96;@layer components&#96;: utility classes that reference theme variables (or extend [packages/web/src/styles/animations.css](packages/web/src/styles/animations.css)):\n    - &#96;.glass&#96; (backdrop-blur, border) — use Tailwind &#96;@apply&#96; with theme-compatible values\n    - &#96;.animate-fade-in&#96;, &#96;.animate-slide-up&#96; (reuse from animations.css)\n  - Add &#96;:focus-visible&#96; and &#96;::selection&#96; styles\n- Ensure animations.css keyframes (fadeIn, slideUp) are imported in layout or globals\n\n### 2.3 CSS variables for theme (optional but recommended)\n- If Tailwind v4 supports CSS variables, add &#96;:root&#96; variables in globals that map to mystical-purple theme, so utilities can use &#96;var(--color-primary)&#96; etc. Otherwise, keep theme as JS and components use &#96;useTheme()&#96; — no duplication.\n\n---\n\n## Phase 3: Button with CVA\n\n### 3.1 Refactor Button to CVA + Tailwind\n- In [packages/web/src/components/ui/Button.tsx](packages/web/src/components/ui/Button.tsx):\n  - Replace inline style logic with &#96;cva()&#96; base + variants\n  - Variants: &#96;default&#96;, &#96;primary&#96;, &#96;secondary&#96;, &#96;outline&#96;, &#96;text&#96;, &#96;ghost&#96;\n  - Sizes: &#96;sm&#96;, &#96;md&#96;, &#96;lg&#96;, &#96;icon&#96;\n  - Use &#96;cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))&#96; for class merging\n  - Keep &#96;loading&#96; and &#96;fullWidth&#96; props; style via classes\n  - Ensure colors come from theme (pass via &#96;style&#96; for gradient) or use CSS variables if we add them\n\n**Important**: Current Button uses &#96;useTheme()&#96; and inline styles. Two approaches:\n- **A**: CVA + Tailwind classes (requires theme colors as CSS vars or hardcoded Tailwind palette)\n- **B**: CVA + &#96;style&#96; from theme (hybrid — base structure from CVA, colors from theme)\n\nRecommend **B** for single source of truth: CVA for layout/structure, theme for colors. Button applies theme colors via inline style overlay on CVA base classes.\n\n---\n\n## Phase 4: AppLayout (replaces AppHeader)\n\n### 4.1 Create AppLayout component\n- New file: [packages/web/src/components/shared/AppLayout.tsx](packages/web/src/components/shared/AppLayout.tsx)\n- Based on [waqup-new/waqup-new/app/components/layout/Layout.tsx](waqup-new/waqup-new/app/components/layout/Layout.tsx)\n- **Structure**:\n  - Accepts &#96;children&#96;, infers variant from &#96;useAuthStore&#96; (user ? authenticated : public)\n  - Public routes: &#96;/&#96;, &#96;/pricing&#96;, &#96;/how-it-works&#96; — show public nav\n  - Onboarding routes: skip header (return &#96;&lt;main&gt;{children}&lt;/main&gt;&#96;)\n  - Authenticated: full layout with scroll-aware nav + user dropdown\n\n### 4.2 Nav configuration (single source)\n- Define &#96;NAV_ITEMS&#96; and &#96;USER_MENU_ITEMS&#96; in AppLayout (or a shared config file):\n  - Main nav: Sanctuary (&#96;/sanctuary&#96;), Library (&#96;/library&#96;), Reminders (&#96;/sanctuary/reminders&#96;)\n  - User dropdown: Credits (&#96;/sanctuary/credits&#96;, showBalance), Share &amp; Earn (&#96;/sanctuary/referral&#96;, highlight), Settings (&#96;/sanctuary/settings&#96;), Sign out\n- Use &#96;usePathname()&#96; for active state\n- Use &#96;useAuthStore&#96; for user, logout\n\n### 4.3 Scroll-aware nav\n- &#96;useState(false)&#96; for &#96;isScrolled&#96;\n- &#96;useEffect&#96; with &#96;window.addEventListener('scroll', () =&gt; setIsScrolled(window.scrollY &gt; 0))&#96;\n- Nav className: &#96;isScrolled ? 'bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-lg shadow-lg' : 'bg-transparent'&#96;\n\n### 4.4 Mobile menu with Framer Motion\n- &#96;useState(false)&#96; for &#96;isMobileMenuOpen&#96;\n- Desktop: &#96;hidden md:flex&#96;\n- Mobile: &#96;motion.div&#96; with &#96;animate={{ height: isMobileMenuOpen ? 'auto' : 0, opacity: ... }}&#96;\n- Close on route change: &#96;useEffect&#96; reset when &#96;pathname&#96; changes\n\n### 4.5 Replace AppHeader with AppLayout\n- Update all layouts that use &#96;AppHeader&#96;:\n  - [packages/web/app/(main)/layout.tsx](packages/web/app/(main)/layout.tsx)\n  - [packages/web/app/(marketing)/layout.tsx](packages/web/app/(marketing)/layout.tsx)\n  - [packages/web/app/sanctuary/layout.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/layout.tsx)\n  - [packages/web/app/(onboarding)/layout.tsx](packages/web/app/(onboarding)/layout.tsx)\n- Replace with &#96;&lt;AppLayout&gt;{children}&lt;/AppLayout&gt;&#96;\n- Remove AppHeader import; AppLayout wraps entire app shell (background + nav + main)\n- **PageShell**: Keep for AnimatedBackground + content padding; AppLayout provides nav. Pages that currently use PageShell + AppHeader will use PageShell + AppLayout (AppLayout in layout.tsx wraps everything; PageShell wraps page content).\n\n**Layout hierarchy**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nAppLayout (nav + main wrapper)\n  └── main\n        └── PageShell (per-page: background, padding, max-width)\n              └── page content\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nSo: layouts use &#96;ThemeSelector&#96; + &#96;AppLayout&#96;, pages use &#96;PageShell&#96; inside. AppLayout replaces AppHeader and adds scroll behavior, dropdown, mobile menu.\n\n### 4.6 Deprecate AppHeader\n- Delete or deprecate [packages/web/src/components/shared/AppHeader.tsx](packages/web/src/components/shared/AppHeader.tsx)\n- Update [packages/web/src/components/shared/index.ts](packages/web/src/components/shared/index.ts) — export AppLayout, remove AppHeader\n- Update pages that import AppHeader directly (e.g. page.tsx, showcase, etc.) — these get header from layout, so remove AppHeader from page-level imports\n\n---\n\n## Phase 5: Sanctuary Home Page Grid\n\n### 5.1 Rewrite sanctuary page\n- In [packages/web/app/sanctuary/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/page.tsx):\n  - Replace PlaceholderPage with full layout from reference\n  - Use &#96;PageShell&#96;, &#96;CONTENT_MAX_WIDTH&#96;, &#96;PAGE_TOP_PADDING&#96; (or pt-24), &#96;spacing&#96;\n  - **Quick Actions** grid: &#96;grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8&#96;, cards: Create New, Set Reminder, Learn &amp; Transform\n  - **Menu Items** grid: &#96;grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8&#96;, cards: Library, Progress, Credits (with count), Settings\n  - Card styling: use &#96;Card&#96; component with &#96;variant=\"elevated\"&#96; for quick actions, &#96;variant=\"default\"&#96; for menu; ensure hover states\n  - Icon circles: use theme &#96;colors.gradients.primary&#96;, &#96;borderRadius.full&#96;, &#96;spacing&#96;\n\n### 5.2 Ensure design token usage\n- All spacing from &#96;spacing.*&#96;\n- All colors from &#96;useTheme().theme.colors&#96;\n- No hardcoded &#96;#...&#96; or &#96;rgb(...)&#96; except in theme\n\n---\n\n## Phase 6: Creation Flow Context and Init Step\n\n### 6.1 RitualBuilderContext (generic: ContentCreationContext)\n- New file: [packages/web/src/lib/contexts/ContentCreationContext.tsx](packages/web/src/lib/contexts/ContentCreationContext.tsx)\n- Generic context for affirmations, meditations, rituals\n- State: &#96;contentType&#96;, &#96;currentStep&#96;, &#96;intent&#96;, &#96;script&#96;, &#96;voice&#96;, etc. (minimal for now)\n- Provider wraps creation layout\n\n### 6.2 Creation layout wrapper\n- In [packages/web/app/sanctuary/rituals/create/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/rituals/create/page.tsx): currently PlaceholderPage. We add layout.\n- Create [packages/web/app/sanctuary/rituals/create/layout.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/rituals/create/layout.tsx):\n  - Wrap with &#96;ContentCreationProvider&#96; (or &#96;RitualBuilderProvider&#96; for rituals)\n  - Apply consistent create-shell: &#96;min-h-screen&#96;, gradient background (via PageShell or inline), &#96;py-12 px-4 sm:px-6&#96;\n\n### 6.3 Init step component (reusable)\n- New file: [packages/web/src/components/content/CreateFlowInitStep.tsx](packages/web/src/components/content/CreateFlowInitStep.tsx)\n- Props: &#96;title&#96;, &#96;description&#96;, &#96;steps: Array&lt;{ icon, title, description }&gt;&#96;, &#96;tips?: string[]&#96;, &#96;nextHref&#96;, &#96;nextLabel&#96;\n- Renders: header, steps list with icons, \"Before You Begin\" box (if tips), CTA link/button\n\n### 6.4 Apply init step to rituals create\n- Create [packages/web/app/sanctuary/rituals/create/init/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/rituals/create/init/page.tsx)\n- Use CreateFlowInitStep with ritual steps (Target, Heart, Mic, Sparkles), tips, nextHref=&#96;/sanctuary/rituals/create/goals&#96; (or next step)\n- Update [packages/web/app/sanctuary/rituals/create/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/rituals/create/page.tsx): redirect to &#96;init&#96; or render init content (per docs, first step is Intent/Init)\n\n### 6.5 Similar for affirmations and meditations\n- Add &#96;layout.tsx&#96; with ContentCreationProvider\n- Add &#96;init/page.tsx&#96; using CreateFlowInitStep with type-specific steps\n- Affirmations steps: Select/Theme, Voice, Audio, Mix, Complete (simplified for init)\n- Meditations: parallel structure\n\n---\n\n## Phase 7: Cleanup and Verification\n\n### 7.1 Remove redundancy\n- Audit Card, GlassCard, Button: ensure no duplicate definitions of &#96;backdrop-blur&#96;, &#96;border-white/10&#96;, etc. — all from theme\n- Consolidate any repeated \"glass card\" styles into GlassCard or a shared hook\n\n### 7.2 Update showcase\n- [packages/web/app/showcase/page.tsx](packages/web/app/showcase/page.tsx): Ensure it demonstrates new Button variants, Layout (or note that Layout is in app shell), updated design tokens\n\n### 7.3 Update routing\n- Ensure &#96;/sanctuary&#96; is the authenticated home (docs alignment). Update any links from &#96;/home&#96; to &#96;/sanctuary&#96; if we consolidate.\n- Nav items point to &#96;/sanctuary&#96;, &#96;/library&#96;, &#96;/sanctuary/reminders&#96;, etc.\n\n---\n\n## File Change Summary\n\n| Action | File |\n|--------|------|\n| Add deps | package.json |\n| Create | src/lib/utils.ts |\n| Extend | src/theme/design-tokens.ts |\n| Update | app/layout.tsx (Inter font) |\n| Update | app/globals.css (utilities, focus, selection) |\n| Refactor | src/components/ui/Button.tsx (CVA) |\n| Create | src/components/shared/AppLayout.tsx |\n| Delete/deprecate | src/components/shared/AppHeader.tsx |\n| Update | All layouts using AppHeader |\n| Rewrite | app/sanctuary/page.tsx |\n| Create | src/lib/contexts/ContentCreationContext.tsx |\n| Create | app/sanctuary/rituals/create/layout.tsx |\n| Create | src/components/content/CreateFlowInitStep.tsx |\n| Create | app/sanctuary/rituals/create/init/page.tsx |\n| Update | app/sanctuary/rituals/create/page.tsx |\n| Create | app/sanctuary/affirmations/create/layout.tsx, init/page.tsx |\n| Create | app/sanctuary/meditations/create/layout.tsx, init/page.tsx |\n\n---\n\n## Out of Scope (per user)\n- Auth system changes (AuthForm, inline auth)\n- Changes to login, signup, forgot-password, etc.\n",

---

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Reviewing layout structure**

I'm deciding whether to add a root-level layout for consistent navigation or keep the landing page rendering its own header. 

**Adding root layout**

I'm adding a root AppLayout for consistent navigation while preserving auth routes' specific layouts. 

**Configuring layout hierarchy**

I'm adjusting the layout hierarchy so auth routes use a minimal layout without AppHeader, while the root layout includes ThemeProvider and AuthProvider. 

**Updating landing page layout**

I'm replacing AppHeader with AppLayout in the landing page to ensure proper navigation structure. I'm restructuring the landing page to place AppLayout as the outer wrapper and PageShell as its child, moving AppHeader inside PageShell. 

**Restructuring layout**

I'm wrapping the landing page content with AppLayout and removing AppHeader, since AppLayout provides the header at the root level. I'm adding AppLayout to the root layout to wrap all pages, since it handles onboarding and auth/nav differences. 

I'm implementing AppLayout in the root layout with AuthProvider wrapper to handle client-side navigation and authentication states. I'm moving AppLayout to the root layout and removing duplicate ThemeSelector and AppHeader from group layouts. I'm adding AppLayout to root layout to avoid duplicating ThemeSelector and AppHeader across route groups. 

I'm updating pages to use AppLayout instead of duplicating AppHeader. I'm deciding whether to move the landing page under (marketing) layout or add a default layout with AppLayout. I'm adding AppLayout to the landing page to match the marketing layout structure. I'm adding AppLayout to the root layout so all routes inherit it. I'm adjusting the root layout to properly handle nested routes by ensuring AppLayout wraps the pricing page correctly. I'm removing AppLayout from root layout to prevent duplication in nested routes like /pricing. 

I'm reconsidering the landing page structure to align with the plan for header inheritance from layout. I'm adjusting the root layout to include a layout for the root page using a special case approach. I'm adjusting the root layout to include AppLayout and handling nested routes with specialized layouts. </details></think>

Summary of implemented changes:

## Implemented design system alignment

### Phase 1: Foundation
- Added **framer-motion**, **class-variance-authority**, **clsx**, **tailwind-merge**
- Added `cn()` in `src/lib/utils.ts`
- Extended design tokens: `NAV_HEIGHT`, `PAGE_TOP_PADDING`, `MAX_WIDTH_7XL`

### Phase 2: Typography and globals
- Set **Inter** as root font in `app/layout.tsx`
- Updated `app/globals.css`: scroll-behavior, antialiasing, `:focus-visible`, `::selection`, `.glass`, `.animate-fade-in`, `.animate-slide-up`

### Phase 3: Button with CVA
- Refactored `Button.tsx` to use **class-variance-authority**
- Variants: primary, secondary, outline, text, ghost
- Sizes: sm, md, lg, icon
- Theme colors applied via inline style overlay

### Phase 4: AppLayout (replaces AppHeader)
- Added `AppLayout.tsx` with:
  - Scroll-aware nav (background on scroll)
  - User dropdown (Credits, Share & Earn, Settings, Sign out)
  - Mobile menu (Framer Motion)
  - Nav: Sanctuary, Library, Reminders
- Moved **ThemeSelector** and **AppLayout** into root layout
- Removed **AppHeader**
- Simplified group layouts: (main), (marketing), sanctuary, (onboarding), (auth), auth

### Phase 5: Sanctuary home page
- Reworked `/sanctuary` with Quick Actions and Menu grids
- Uses `PageShell`, `Card`, design tokens, theme colors

### Phase 6: Creation flow context and init step
- Added **ContentCreationContext** (`src/lib/contexts/ContentCreationContext.tsx`)
- Added **CreateFlowInitStep**
- Added create layouts and init pages for rituals, affirmations, meditations:
  - `rituals/create/layout.tsx`, `init/page.tsx`, `goals/page.tsx`
  - `affirmations/create/layout.tsx`, `init/page.tsx`
  - `meditations/create/layout.tsx`, `init/page.tsx`
- Create entry pages redirect to `/init`

### Phase 7: Cleanup
- Removed ThemeSelector from auth layouts
- Updated page imports (removed AppHeader/ThemeSelector where redundant)

**Note:** `npm run type-check` still reports an error in `app/(main)/library/page.tsx` (JSX structure). That file was not changed; it appears to be a pre-existing issue.
